one_line: A behavioral doctrine + enforcement layer that makes Claude Opus write and judge like a stronger model; measured #1 vs every published competitor.

headline_regression.design: 6 arms x 2 probes (P6 advice, P7 copy) x 30 runs x dual Opus+Sonnet judges
headline_regression.per_criterion_note: substance (c1-c3) near-ceiling for all arms; separation lives in c4 sentence-shape and c5 form (bare c5=0.84 vs noslop_full 1.90)

headline_regression_extended.design: 6 arms x 4 probes (P6 advice, P7 copy, P17r rewrite-reconstructed, P18 empathy) x 30 runs x dual Opus+Sonnet judges; extension subjects headless-clean, judges in-session
headline_regression_extended.self_preference: still ruled out (interaction n.s. at 4 probes)
headline_regression_extended.ranking_note: a no-slop tier ranks #1 on each of the four probes; bare ranks last on all four

leaderboard_headline.note: harsh blind judging; each cell at its highest-n same-round measurement, across 8 probe types
leaderboard_headline.vs_field: won 7 of 8 fields outright, tied 1, lost 0 at highest-n

half_life.finding: doctrine decays over conversational distance; fix = re-injection not more text

halflife2.finding: below-bare decay did not reproduce at n=8 (original was n=3); re-injection directionally strongest; distractors reconstructed - not cell-comparable to the n=3 run

over_refusal.finding: no systematic overcorrection; strengthens needed caveats

pressure.finding: parity; graceful compliance when user owns the call (9.75)

version_progression.note: advisory-probe total across doctrine versions (mixed n)

known_limits: extension rewrite probe is a reconstruction (P17r) - historical P17 cells not comparable
wrapper/preamble floor persists in chat-delivered artifacts (mechanical fix: artifact-to-file)
half-life edge held at n=8 (doctrine 9.06 vs bare 8.31); the below-bare n=3 decay did not reproduce, re-injection directionally strongest
